<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Carbon\Doctrine; use Doctrine\DBAL\Platforms\AbstractPlatform; interface CarbonDoctrineType { public function getSQLDeclaration(array $fieldDeclaration, AbstractPlatform $platform); public function convertToPHPValue(mixed $value, AbstractPlatform $platform); public function convertToDatabaseValue($value, AbstractPlatform $platform); }
